task_completion.description: Set the report name to 'Active Cases by Priority' and the module to 'Cases'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the report creation/edit view, the 'Name' text input contains 'Active Cases by Priority' and the 'Report Module' dropdown is set to 'Cases'.

task_completion.description: Add a condition to filter out 'Closed' cases
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Conditions section, there is a rule where the field is 'Status', the operator is 'Not Equal To' (or similar exclusion), and the value is 'Closed'.

task_completion.description: Select Number, Subject, Priority, and Status as display columns
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Fields section, the selected/display columns list includes 'Number', 'Subject', 'Priority', and 'Status'.

task_completion.description: Add a Pie chart titled 'Case Priority Distribution'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Charts section, the 'Title' input contains 'Case Priority Distribution' and the 'Type' dropdown is set to 'Pie'.

task_completion.description: Set the chart to group records by Priority
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Charts section, the 'X-Axis' or grouping field is set to 'Priority'.

task_completion.description: Save the report and view the results
task_completion.visual_evidence: A final view showing the saved report details, which should display the rendered 'Case Priority Distribution' pie chart and a table of the filtered cases.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SuiteCRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the SuiteCRM application, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually filled out the report creation form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Advanced OpenReports edit/creation view with fields being actively selected and filled, rather than just jumping to a pre-existing report.

integrity.description: The final chart is genuinely rendered by the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The pie chart in the final screenshot appears as a standard SuiteCRM/AOR rendered chart, not an externally pasted image or text mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The report must be named 'Active Cases by Priority' and use the 'Cases' module. The filter condition must be on the 'Status' field (database name: 'status') with an operator like 'Not Equal To' and value 'Closed'. The selected display columns must include 'Number' (case_number), 'Subject' (name), 'Priority' (priority), and 'Status' (status). The chart must be a 'Pie' chart titled 'Case Priority Distribution' with the X-Axis/Grouping set to 'Priority'.
